answer: Apple's Q4 2024 results showed revenue of $94.9B (+6% YoY) driven by Services and iPhone strength [1]. Management guided to mid-single-digit growth for Q1 2025 [2]...

citations.title: Apple Inc. (AAPL) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
citations.snippet: Revenue of $94.9 billion, up 6 percent year over year...

citations.title: Apple Inc. - Q4 2024 10-K
citations.snippet: Services net sales were $24.97 billion, an increase of 13 percent...
